zh.lifeSummary: 當Experience Childe於1669年2月26日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃特托時，她的父親Richard Childe37歲，母親Mehitabel Dimmock26歲。她於1690年9月26日與Benjamin Flagg在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃特托結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1759年7月11日在她的家鄉享年90歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃特托。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Experience Childe于1669年2月26日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃特托时，她的父亲Richard Childe37岁，母亲Mehitabel Dimmock26岁。她于1690年9月26日与Benjamin Flagg在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃特托结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1759年7月11日在她的家乡享年90岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃特托。

nameMeanings.name: Childe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Child
meanings: nickname from Middle English child ‘child, infant’ (Old English cild), in various possible applications. The word is found in Old English as a byname, and in Middle English as a widely used affectionate term of address. It was also used as a term of status for a young man of noble birth, although the exact meaning is not clear; in the 13th and 14th centuries it was a technical term used of a young noble awaiting elevation to the knighthood. In other cases it may have been applied as a byname to a youth considerably younger than his brothers or to one who was a minor on the death of his father.
in Kent, possibly a topographic name from Old English cielde ‘spring (water)’, a rare word derived from c(e)ald ‘cold’.

nameMeanings.name: Experience
meanings: Found as a female name in the Yarmouth parish records. It explains itself.

en.lifeSummary: When Experience Childe was born on 26 February 1669, in Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, her father, Richard Childe, was 37 and her mother, Mehitabel Dimmock, was 26. She married Benjamin Flagg on 26 September 1690, in Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 5 daughters. She died on 11 July 1759, in her hometown, at the age of 90, and was buried in Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Experience Childe est née le 26 février 1669, à Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, Richard Childe, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Mehitabel Dimmock, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé Benjamin Flagg le 26 septembre 1690, à Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée le 11 juillet 1759, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 90 ans, et a été enterrée à Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique.

de.lifeSummary: Als Experience Childe am 26. Februar 1669 in Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Richard Childe 37 und ihre Mutter Mehitabel Dimmock 26. Sie hat am 26. September 1690 in Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America Benjamin Flagg geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb am 11. Juli 1759 im Alter von 90 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Experience Childe è nata il il 26 febbraio 1669 nel Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, sua padre, Richard Childe, aveva 37 anni e sua madre, Mehitabel Dimmock, aveva 26 anni. Lei sposato Benjamin Flagg il 26 settembre 1690, nel Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 11 luglio 1759, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 90 anni, e fu sepolta a Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: Experience Childeが1669年2月26日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックスワテルトウンで生まれた時，父Richard Childeは37歳，母Mehitabel Dimmockは26歳であった。1690年9月26日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックスワテルトウンでBenjamin Flaggと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1759年7月11日に故郷で90歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックスワテルトウンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Experience Childe(이)가 1669년 2월 26일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 왓르타운에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard Childe(은)는 37세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mehitabel Dimmock(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 1690년 9월 26일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 왓르타운에서 Benjamin Flagg(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1759년 7월 11일 그녀의 고향에서 90세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 왓르타운에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Experience Childe nasceu em 26 de fevereiro de 1669, em Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, seu pai, Richard Childe, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Mehitabel Dimmock, tinha 26 anos. Ela casou-se com Benjamin Flagg em 26 de setembro de 1690, em Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 11 de julho de 1759, em sua cidade natal, com 90 anos, e foi sepultada em Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Experience Childe родилась 26 февраля 1669 г. в местности вэитиртоун, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика, её отцу по имени Richard Childe было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Mehitabel Dimmock, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Benjamin Flagg 26 сентября 1690 г. в местности вэитиртоун, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Она умерла 11 июля 1759 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 90 лет и была похоронена в местности вэитиртоун, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Experience Childe nació el 26 de febrero de 1669, en Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, su papá, Richard Childe, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Mehitabel Dimmock, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Benjamin Flagg el 26 de septiembre de 1690, en Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 11 de julio de 1759, en su pueblo, a la edad de 90 años, y fue sepultada en Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.
